name: Blue Goo Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cream cheese, powdered sugar, and Dream Whip until well mixed.
2. Slice the bananas into thin pieces.
3. Place the prepared pie shells on a baking sheet.
4. Fill each pie shell with the banana slices and the cream cheese mixture.
5. Add the blueberry can pie mix to each pie.
6. Store the pies in the refrigerator or serve immediately.
